expectations.text: uses_chartjs: Does the HTML use Chart.js (not CSS-only bars)?
expectations.evidence: No Chart.js script included; bars are CSS-only div elements with `transform: scaleY()` animation

expectations.text: all_six_months: Are all 6 months (1〜6月) present in the chart data?
expectations.evidence: data array contains { month: '1月' } through { month: '6月' } with values 120, 150, 90, 180, 210, 170

expectations.text: has_pptx_export: Is there a PPTX export button or function?
expectations.evidence: No pptxgenjs library loaded and no export button or function present anywhere in the HTML

expectations.text: animation_pptx_timing: Is initPPTXExport or canvas.toDataURL called inside animation.onComplete?
expectations.evidence: No Chart.js animation.onComplete, no canvas.toDataURL, no initPPTXExport anywhere in the file
